75709.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 9
75709.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-9-cryptobeholder-aewzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bkcs3DYHwQeCFoaQ3Vj%2B0GQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0QS_--b--ZCck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrdps80f~qv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdps80f-qv
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Infrastructure and institutions took center stage as Swift and Sony pushed deeper into tokenization, while a wallet exploit, a $122M scam bust, and a stalled market-structure bill kept sentiment cautious. Adoption advances, but safety and regulatory questions linger. 🏦 Swift activates blockchain ledger with 17 global banks Swift switched on its blockchain-based shared ledger for initial use, with 17 major banks — including HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi — preparing to pilot live 24/7 cross-border payments using tokenized deposits, a significant step toward mainstream tokenization. Read full story → 🏛️ Sony Bank wins US regulatory nod to issue stablecoins Sony Bank secured conditional approval from the OCC to establish a US stablecoin trust bank, capitalized with $40 million, marking another major corporate entrant into the regulated dollar-stablecoin market. More details → 🪙 New Hampshire becomes first state to approve Bitcoin treasury New Hampshire became the first US state to approve Bitcoin treasury investments and is now eyeing a $100 million Bitcoin-backed bond, a landmark move that could set a template for state-level crypto adoption. Read more → 🚨 Interpol busts $122M crypto romance-scam network An Interpol operation uncovered a single crypto wallet that processed more than $122.5 million tied to romance-scam laundering, part of a global anti-fraud sweep that led to 5,811 arrests. See details → 🔓 Cardano wallet exploit drains $2.4M in ADA A flaw in SecondFi's wallet address-generation system drained roughly $2.4 million in ADA from 374 wallets, prompting EMURGO to step back from Cardano's Pentad infrastructure group to focus on fund recovery. Read full story → 📉 Strategy sells 3,588 BTC in its largest divestment yet Strategy offloaded 3,588 BTC in its biggest Bitcoin sale since going all-in on the asset, a move that could reshape how corporate treasuries manage holdings and signals a notable shift in sentiment. More details → ⚖️ CLARITY Act misses July deadline as August 7 looms Congress missed its self-imposed July 4 deadline to pass the CLARITY Act, and the crypto market-structure bill now faces roughly a 50/50 shot of clearing the Senate before an August 7 target. Read more → 📬 Subscribe for the AI-curated daily crypto digest at cryptobeholder.com
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn

 The Economist

Senior digital editor



 Muscovites are unnerved. Petrol shortages, drone strikes, internet outages and the threat of a new round of mobilisation are making Vladimir Putin’s war harder than ever to ignore.

As we report ,

75705.subject: Tokenized equities are coming to CoinList
75705.body:
No wrapper. No broker. No middleman. Real equity, onchain.

( https://coinlist.co/superstate?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=7.9 )

The token is the share.

For years, "tokenized stock" meant a wrapper - a synthetic IOU pointing at equity held somewhere else, by someone else. When SpaceX allocations fell through across major exchanges this year, that gap stopped being theoretical.

CoinList + Superstate Opening Bell close it. Tokenized IPOs and follow-on offerings from U.S. public companies, issued natively onchain: the token you hold is the real, actual share - direct ownership on Solana and Ethereum, with SEC-approved transfer-agent recordkeeping.

*No wrapper. No broker. No middleman.
*
Buy with stablecoins. Shares are minted straight to your wallet, in your name. Then use them as collateral, trade them on supported venues, or move them between wallets - the utility crypto always promised, finally attached to real equity.

Demand for this is already onchain. Issuance and access are what's been missing. This is where they meet.

It's also a glimpse of why we're building *Passage* ( https://passage.coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=7.9 ) -  an access layer so any tokenized asset can reach the people who actually want it. Superstate equities are the kind of thing it's built for.

JOIN THE WAITLIST ( https://coinlist.co/superstate?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=button&utm_campaign=7.9 )

Legal Notice

The products, services, information and/or materials referenced may not be available for all individuals or residents of certain jurisdictions.

This email is being distributed by CoinList Global Services , dba “CoinList,” or one of its affiliates. This email and use of the CoinList website is subject to certain disclosures, restrictions and risks, available here ( https://coinlist.co/disclaimers ). Nothing in this presentation shall constitute or be construed as an offering of securities or as investment advice, tax advice or investment recommendations (i.e., recommendations as to whether to enter or not to enter into any transaction involving any specific interest or interests) by CoinList, or any of its affiliates or a recommendation as to an investment or other strategy.

The information in this email is subject to change without notice. CoinList makes no representations or endorsements whatsoever regarding any third-party content/sites that may be accessible directly or indirectly from this email or the CoinList website. While CoinLists takes reasonable efforts to confirm the information presented in this newsletter, it makes no representations, warranties or endorsements whatsoever with respect to any information provided by third parties.

Unsubscribe ( http://url8430.coinlist.co/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=12935377&data=Kj-MhdMLmye_m6LIX0vbkdGbl_fx13IboAQ9m4jX8YtoMDAwdTAwMJFL6kKVssRJy7E47dRXW5bCT2tN4yx91nV49z8nZETygOuh9m_VXd4090sXfCAfXAVnKeBU1sepWEosGy4iX9v7_vzTuXHD

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať. Telefón: +421 222 11 55 65 E-mail: zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Otváracie hodiny Vami vybraného obchodného domu nájdete tu . Ďakujeme za Váš nákup a želáme Vám príjemný deň. Vaše SCONTO Potrebujete poradiť? Sme tu pre Vás celý týždeň vrátane víkendov 8-18h +421 222 11 55 65 zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Vše o nákupu Obchodní podmínky Starostlivosť o nábytok Odstúpenie od zmluvy Reklamácie Sledujte nás Prevádzkovateľom internetového obchodu sconto.sk je SCONTO Nábytok s.r.o., Nová ul. 8144/10, 917 01 Trnava, IČO 44731159, DIČ 2022821273, IČ DPH SK 2022821273, zapísaná v obchodnom registri Okresného súdu Trnava, oddiel Sro, vložka 25761/T.

75664.body:

Subject: Fwd: " Spoločnou cestou íst,v láske svoj život žiť, Oleh Novosadov
a Ruslana Kozanchyn "
To: Oleg Novosadov <oleg.novosadov@minebeamitsumi.eu>




---------- Forwarded message ---------
Від: Martin Kovac <martin.kovac@minebeamitsumi.eu>
Date: пн, 6 лип. 2026 р. о 08:10
Subject: " Spoločnou cestou íst,v láske svoj život žiť, Oleh Novosadov a
Ruslana Kozanchyn "
To: Oleksii Pushkarov <oleksii.pushkarov@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Mario Trela <
mario.trela@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Jana Vattaiova <
jana.vattaiova@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Katarina Kochova <

jan.kristian@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Martin German <
martin.german@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Erik Kiral <erik.kiral@minebeamitsumi.eu>,
Lukas Belus <lukas.belus@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Rastislav Balogac <
rastislav.balogac@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Matus Baco <
matus.baco@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Volodymyr Vasylenko <
volodymyr.vasylenko@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Lukas Merges <
lukas.merges@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Attila Ambruz <
attila.ambruz@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Alin Micula <alin.micula@minebeamitsumi.eu>,
Tobias Miklos <tobias.miklos@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Oleksandr Danko <
oleksandr.danko@nmb-minebea.com>, Vladyslav Savka <
vladyslav.savka@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Denys Pohrebnoi <
denys.pohrebnoi@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Marek Kleri <
marek.kleri@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Karol Kamenicky <
karol.kamenicky@minebeamitsumi.eu>, MAINTENANCE
AUTOMOTIVE/KSC/EUR/MINEBEA@MINEBEA <MAINTENANCE.AUTOMOTIVE@nmb-minebea.com>,
Kosice AGA Process Engineering <ksc_aga_process_engineering@nmb-minebea.com>,
Dmytro Dovhulia <dmytro.dovhulia@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Yurii Zozulia <
yurii.zozulia@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Jana Benkova <
jana.benkova@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Lucia Hastova <
lucia.hastova@minebeamitsumi.eu>


Ahojte,

Chcel by som Vam dat na znamost ,  ze sa z lásky budú brať dna 26.07.2026
nasi kolegovia a buduci Novomanželia a to Ruslana Kozanchyn a Oleh
Novosadov .

Touto cestou by som chcel teda spustit symbolicku zbierku / pozdrav  pre
novomanželov, aby mali príjemnú spomienku na nas kolegov z prace,a
samozrejme aj nejaku malu financnu pozornost od nas, na lahsi zaciatok v
spolocnom zivote,


[image: svadba-svadobne-oznamenie.jpg]

Samozrejme vsetko na dobrovolnej baze,kartu s obalkou mam zatial u seba,
postupne ju budem posielat aj na ine zmeny, ak by niekto chcel v priebehu
zmeny, kludne sa za mnou zastavte,

PS: snazil som sa pridat vsetkych,ak som na niekoho zabudol,poprosil by som
o " doplnenie "

Dakujem







-- 

*Ďakujem,*

S pozdravom,

Kind regards,


*Oleksii Pushkarov*

Deputy - Line Leader
